scripts.bundle-size:sync: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:bundle-size && pnpm run test:vue-bundle-size && pnpm run test:vue-seo-bundle-size && pnpm run test:precompile-runtime-bundle-size && pnpm run test:react-bundle-size && pnpm run test:schema-org-bundle-size && bun bench/bundle/analyze.ts && bun bench/bundle/update.ts
scripts.test:bundle-size: unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/client-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/client-full-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/client-sc-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/server-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/server-sc-build.config.ts
scripts.test:vue-bundle-size: unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/vue-client-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/vue-client-full-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/vue-server-build.config.ts
scripts.test:vue-seo-bundle-size: unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/vue-client-seo-build.config.ts && UNHEAD_BUNDLE_PRECOMPILE=false unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/vue-client-seo-plugin-build.config.ts && UNHEAD_BUNDLE_PRECOMPILE=true unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/vue-client-seo-plugin-build.config.ts
scripts.test:precompile-runtime-bundle-size: UNHEAD_BUNDLE_PRECOMPILE=false unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/precompile-runtime-build.config.ts && UNHEAD_BUNDLE_PRECOMPILE=true unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/precompile-runtime-build.config.ts
scripts.test:react-bundle-size: unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/react-client-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/react-client-full-build.config.ts && unbuild bench/bundle --config bench/bundle/react-server-build.config.ts
scripts.build:devtools-app: pnpm --filter @unhead/devtools-app exec nuxi prepare && pnpm --filter @unhead/devtools-app run build
scripts.build:all: pnpm build && pnpm build:devtools-app && pnpm --filter @unhead/bundler run build
scripts.test:memory: pnpm --filter unhead run build && node --expose-gc bench/memory/ssr.mjs
scripts.release: pnpm build:all && pnpm build:aliases && pnpm bump
